chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 655 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 07.08.2024 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Aijaz Ali Memon, District Accounts Officer, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Statement has been filed by District Accounts Officer, Sukkur attaching copy of a cheque showing that the unpaid sum of Rs.5,318,092/- on account of unpaid Commutation has already been transferred to the account of the petitioner maintained in Habib Bank Limited. Having seen the comprehensive statement, learned counsel for the petitioner states that funds have been transferred and grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, hence does not press this petition. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Assistance of the Officer is appreciated. Judge Judge ARBROHI
